sections.paragraph:
Original: רסן

Transliteration: resen

Phonetic: reh'-sen

BDB Definition:

  1. something that restrains, halter, jaw
    1. halter
      1. of restraint thrown off (figuratively)
    2. jaw (of crocodile)

Origin: from an unused root meaning to curb

TWOT entry: 2180a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
